groups.title: Lifeguard Application
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Personal information Name: Peter Smith Address: 130 South Main Street, Lake $1$ Contact number: $2$ (cellphone) Work experience: • has a part-time job as a $3$ • is studying PE now • hope to work in a high school as a $4$ coach Other relevant work experience: worked at the $5$ as a lifeguard Qualification for water safety: • Good level of concentration • Good vision • Other relevant skills: $6$ • need a certificate: it expires in $7$ Other information • Preferred working time: $8$ mornings • He can start to work at $9$ o'clock • Source of information: $10$

questions.title: has a part-time job as a 【   】
hope to work in a high school as a 【   】 coach
worked at the 【   】 as a lifeguard
need a certificate: it expires in 【   】
He can start to work at 【   】 o'clock

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Hello, North Bay Aquatic Centre, Jane speaking.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Oh, hello.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I'm calling to apply for a part-time lifeguard position.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Am I speaking to the right person?

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Yes, you are.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: We are currently recruiting lifeguards for two different positions.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: But first, I'll have to jot down some of your personal information before we officially invite you for an interview.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Is that alright?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Sure.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: No problem.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: May I have your name, please?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: It's Peter, Peter Smith.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: And what is your current address?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: It's 130 South Main Street, Lake Elsinore.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: I'm sorry, Elsinore?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Oh, it's E-L-S-I-N-O-R-E, Elsinore.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Got it!

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: What is your phone number?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: My home phone number is 0-double 7-double 9-5-3-6-2.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Actually, it's easier to reach me by my cellphone number.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I'm mainly out these days.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Can you tell me about your work experience?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Well, I now work as a waiter.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: And that's just a part-time gig.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: It requires serving customers, and I also have some cleaning duties.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Do you have any other part-time job?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: No.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: But I'm majoring in physical education right now.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I'm learning exercise physiology, sports nutrition and individual fitness activities.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: And I want to become a baseball coach for a local high school.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: So, do you have any other relevant work experience to a lifeguard position?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Oh, right.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I also worked part-time as a rescue diver for a local beach last summer.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I'm certified for open water rescue missions.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Excellent.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: That's exactly what we're looking for.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Before we continue, I need to know a few more things to ensure that you are qualified for maintaining water safety during work.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Go ahead.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: As a lifeguard, you will spend most of your time monitoring the area near the water and reducing risks to everyone here.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: So we are looking for someone who can stay focused.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Do you have difficulties concentrating or any related disorders?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: No.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I don't have any medical disorders relating to that sort of problem.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: We're also expecting someone with good eyesight because a lifeguard must be able to recognise and respond to any struggling swimmers quickly.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I have sharp vision.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I mean, both eyes are 20-10 without correction.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Good.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Do you have relevant skills in terms of lifeguarding?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I'm good at diving.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: You know my previous job requires training in that.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: We only need lifeguards with certification.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: I assume you already have one, right?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: To get the certificate, I received training for waterfront lifeguarding two years ago.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: The training includes things like providing first aid and emergency care.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: But mine is about to expire in November.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Oh, wait, let me check.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: It's a month earlier, in October.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: You're good for now before it expires.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: But if you want to work here for the whole year, you'll have to renew it.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I see.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: What time do you prefer to work?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I already work part-time in a restaurant on weekdays, so I'd like to work on the weekend.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: We already have enough people working here on Sundays.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I can work on Saturday mornings then.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: And I can start from 6 o'clock in the morning.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I'm a morning person.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Sounds great.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Where did you hear about our recruitment information from?

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I heard it on radio this morning while driving.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: I wouldn't say like reading newspapers.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Thank you for calling.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: We'll notify you about the interview details in two days.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Peter
transcript.en: Bye.

transcript.speaker: Jane
transcript.en: Goodbye.

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 130 South Main Street、Lake，提示词为 address，此处应填地点类名词，原文可能会提供相关拼写。
题目解析：定位词均原词重现，比较容易定位。男士先说出答案词 Elsinore，在女士提问后，又对其进行拼读，考生耐心地听写下来即可。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 cellphone，提示词为 contact number、cellphone，此处应填手机号。
题目解析：本题根据预判抓取数字即可。不过，男士先报的是家里的电话号码，而题干要求的是手机号码。接着往下听，听到男士说他的手机号是 077896245。对于数字类考点，考生要不断训练自己的反应速度。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 part-time job，提示词为 as a，此处应填工作类名词。
题目解析：通过预判先听到符合要求的 waiter 一词，然后才听到定位词 part-time，由此确认 waiter 为正确答案。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 high school、coach；提示词为 as a、coach，此处应填修饰教练的名词或形容词。
题目解析：答案词 baseball 与定位词 coach 搭配出现，并且句子结构与题干一致，较易识别，随后听到的 high school，可以进一步确认答案。

5.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 other relevant work experience、lifeguard，提示词为 at the，此处应填地点类名词。
题目解析：先听到女士提问其他相关的工作经历，随后男士回答做过兼职的 rescue diver，对应题干的 lifeguard，之后听到符合要求的 beach 一词，填写下来即可。

6.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 good vision、other relevant skills，提示词为 other relevant skills，此处应填技能类名词，且与救生员工作相关。
题目解析：本题作为后半段音频的第一题，答案词出现之前的对话较长，考生要先耐心地听完。当听到女士问有没有相关的救生技能时，本题正式开始。男士马上回答 diving，符合题干要求，填写下来即可。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 certificate，提示词为 expires in，此处应填证书到期时间，结合语境判断多为具体年份或月份。
题目解析：先听到女士问及 certification，接着听到男士描述培训的内容，不符合预判的方向，需要耐心往下听。之后听到男生说证书 November 到期，随即又进行修正，改为 October。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 mornings，提示词为 preferred working time，此处应填时间类名词，且能与 mornings 搭配使用。
题目解析：先听到女士提问合适的工作时间，男士先回答工作日要在餐馆打工，只能在 weekend，weekend 符合题干要求且能搭配 mornings 一词，先待定。随后听到女士说周日工作的人已经够了，男士改口说 Saturday mornings，定位词 mornings 原词重现，可以判断 Saturday 为正确答案。注意，本题出现了多个干扰信息，考生需要耐心听取才能得到正确答案。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 o'clock，提示词为 start to work at、o'clock，此处应填男士开始工作的时间。
题目解析：本题与上一题衔接较快，通过 Right 可判断上一题已经结束。接着听到男士补充说他早上 6 点可以开始工作，6 符合题干要求，填写下来即可。

10.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 source of information，此处应填信息来源类名词。
题目解析：本题与上一题衔接较快，通过 Sounds great 可判断上一题已经结束。女士继续提问从哪里听说的招聘信息，男士回答早上开车时从 radio 听到的，可判断 radio 为正确答案。注意，之后出现的 newspapers 虽然符合预判要求，但男士对其进行了否定，属于干扰信息。
